message:
feat(ffs-core): add structured diagnostics for btrfs mount selection (bd-sv1b2)

Log resolved subvolume/snapshot selection with:
- selection_kind (default_root, subvolume, snapshot)
- requested_name (if applicable)
- resolved_objectid
- resolved_root_dirid

This completes the structured diagnostics acceptance criterion for the
btrfs mount selection feature (already implemented).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
